text_excerpt: --> Glebe Farm Fund Survey | Liam Byrne MP top of page HOME HELP FOR CONSTITUENTS RAISE A LOCAL ISSUE YOUR AREA CAMPAIGNS - HUMAN RIGHTS ABOUT More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. SURVEY £20 MILLION SECURED FOR GLEBE FARM INVESTMENT! HOW WOULD YOU USE THAT MONEY? TELL ME BELOW. On 25th September, we received the fantastic news that £20 million has been secured for Glebe Farm as part of the Government's Plan for Neighbourhoods funding scheme. This wouldn't have been possible without a massive collective effort by the constituents of Hodge Hill and Solihull North in signing my petition to Parliament to demand our fair share. Thank you all! Now, we need to decide how that money should be spent – and I want to hear how YOU would like that money used. Please tell me via the survey below. First name * Last name * Phone Email * Address * 1) What is the number 1 issue that you want me to prioritise to get fixed? Single choice Upgrade Glebe Farm Rec and outdoor gym Upgrade Tile Cross Park Help Welcome Change expand services at the new base of Glebe Farm Library Support The Pump's expansion of projects for young people Sort out parking on Glebe Farm and Farmcote Roads Tackle fly-tipping on Farmcote Road and Treaford, Cotterills, and Cole Hall Lanes Tackle speeding on Kitts Green, Audley, Flaxley, Wyndhurst and Tile Cross Roads Fix parking problems outside Audley School Tackle irresponsible parking outside Lea Forest Academy Improve road safety around Oval School 2) Have I missed any local issues that you need fixing? 2) Have I missed any local issues that you need fixing?
